title: Build scripture figure entity model — people (Moses, Abraham, Isaiah, Nephi, Alma, Moroni, Peter, Paul, John, etc.) from LDS core canon verse text
Expand places registry with biblical and Book of Mormon geography — Jerusalem, Jordan River, Galilee, Sinai, Zarahemla, Bountiful, Cumorah, etc.
Annotate scripture verse HTML with entity spans so verse text shows person/place/thing chips in the discovery panel
Build cross-scripture entity connections — when a figure appears in multiple books/chapters, link those occurrences in the profile panel
Build things/artifacts registry for scripture objects — temple, tabernacle, altar, seer stone, iron rod, tree of life, etc.
Deepen intra-canonical semantic links — Book of Mormon verses that echo Old Testament patterns should connect more directly than external sources
Add non-Bible word-study fallbacks for Book of Mormon, D&C, Pearl of Great Price so word clicks always find a relevant scripture cross-reference
Source cleanup: fix Enuma Elish and remaining Ancient Texts that open on OCR noise rather than primary text
